name: oscine
description: Oscine, the browser-native synth composer with an API-first core. Install from here so updates arrive with `claude plugin update` instead of a manual re-upload.

plugins.name: oscine
plugins.description: Compose music with Claude in Oscine, a browser synth composer. Runs a sidecar that serves the app and exposes every feature (tracks, synth params, piano-roll notes, drum steps, mixer, pattern slots, transport) as MCP tools, plus an OSC gateway for hardware/software control surfaces.
